case_title: AHRAM BABAEV VS. SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,824.00 FILED BY BABAEV, AHRAM AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BABAEV, AHRAM AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SEVEN HU--BUSINESS OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
